bodies.text: HockeyOne's broadcast team grew Facebook reach 264% and YouTube views 308% in a single 7-week season — all powered by PULSE AI highlights. Every match moment, every platform, published within seconds of it happening. No editors. No delays. No missed moments. See how your network can replicate these results.

bodies.text: Across 57 national committees at the Islamic Solidarity Games, PULSE AI generated 50,000+ real-time clips and 7.5M+ video views in 15 days. Your broadcast operation can deliver the same quality at scale — without scaling your team. Book a 20-minute demo to see it live.

adName: EU Leagues Creative — Zero-CTR Intervention
diagnosis: Zero clicks on 146 impressions in current 7d window (0.00% CTR). Spend fell 60.4% WoW. Creative is generating no engagement whatsoever. Complete hook and format overhaul required to generate any response from the EU league audience.

bodies.label: B1 — League-operator pain point
bodies.text: Running a league means covering every match, every goal, every moment — across 15+ sports. NSL automated 37,000+ match clips over 80 games, delivered to fans in seconds, and grew Instagram 2× in their inaugural season. PULSE gives your league the same capability without adding a single person to your content team.

bodies.text: Table Tennis England saved 250+ hours of post-production, tripled their upload frequency, and surged total views 105% in just 3 months. Whether you're a national league or a regional association, PULSE AI turns your matches into content — automatically, affordably, and in real time. Let's show you how.

adName: PULSE — Leagues Primary Creative
diagnosis: CTR collapsed 21.3% WoW (0.62% → 0.49%). CPL spiked 31.2% ($124.96 → $164.00). Frequency 3.9 — audience has seen current creative ~4× in 7 days. Creative fatigue confirmed. New copy must lead with specific proof points, not product features.

adName: BRAND GAUGE — Leagues Primary Creative
diagnosis: CTR down 17.8% WoW (0.50% → 0.41%). CPL spiked 22.5% ($111.84 → $137.00). Frequency 3.7 — above fatigue threshold. Current creative likely feature-led rather than outcome-led. New copy must speak to sponsor revenue pressure and measurable ROI that commercial Directors are accountable for.

diagnosis: Broadcaster buyers are volume-and-reliability buyers. ISG Riyadh 2025 (50,000+ clips, 57 NOCs, 15 days) is the only proof point in Spectatr’s arsenal that directly answers scale objections. No live CTR data available — copy built on audience persona analysis.
